title: festuca pallescens
intro: Festuca pallescens, also known as pale fescue or pale meadow-grass, is a type of grass species in the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Festuca pallescens can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it has also been used in herbal supplements, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
